terms.definition: Mandatory bet posted by the player two seats to the dealer's left at the start of a hand.
Mandatory bet posted by the player immediately to the dealer's left before any cards are dealt.
A wager where a player commits all remaining chips during a betting round.
Training flow where players analyze past hands to improve decision making.
Short instructional message surfaced by the training UI to highlight optimal play.
Visual chart showing how a player's winning chances evolve across hand streets.
UI label describing the challenge rating of a training scenario.
Navigation component that tracks a player's advancement through training stages.
Summary screen that aggregates outcomes, feedback, and suggested next drills.
Experience points granted for completing training tasks within the analyzer.
